rect.style: paint-order: fill; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-linecap: round; stroke: rgb(38, 38, 42); fill: rgb(217, 217, 214); stroke-width: 1;
paint-order: fill; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-linecap: round; stroke: rgb(38, 38, 42); fill: rgb(38, 38, 42); stroke-width: 1;

polyline.style: paint-order: fill; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-linecap: round; stroke: rgb(38, 38, 42); fill: rgb(217, 217, 214); stroke-width: 4;

line.style: paint-order: fill; stroke-linejoin: round; stroke-linecap: round; stroke: rgb(38, 38, 42); fill: rgb(217, 217, 214); stroke-width: 4;
